description: The recomputable communication act, in the grammar humans already use — Who · Said what · Through which channel · To whom · With what effect. Each link is a deterministic hash re-derivable from public inputs; a compliant capability reproduces all five, a tampered one cannot.

vectors.name: said_what
vectors.input: swap 1 ETH to USDC on Uniswap

vectors.name: effect
vectors.input: built exactInputSingle calldata; 1 ETH -> USDC; user wallet signs
